values.title: Crestview Realty Homepage
values.hero_description: Whether you are buying your first home, upgrading to your dream property, or investing in real estate, our experienced agents are here to guide you every step of the way.
values.cta_description: Connect with one of our expert agents for a personalized consultation. We will help you navigate the market and find the right property at the right price.

values.title: Charming Craftsman Bungalow
values.body:
This beautifully restored 1920s Craftsman bungalow combines original character with modern amenities. Featuring original hardwood floors, built-in cabinetry, and a stunning stone fireplace in the living room.

Key Features

  • Original hardwood floors throughout
  • Updated chef's kitchen with quartz countertops
  • Finished basement with home office
  • Private backyard with mature landscaping
  • Detached two-car garage
  • Walking distance to downtown shops and restaurants

values.title: Modern Lakefront Condominium
values.body:
Enjoy stunning lake views from this contemporary two-bedroom condominium in the sought-after Lakeside Tower. Floor-to-ceiling windows flood the open living space with natural light.

Key Features

  • Panoramic lake views from every room
  • Open-concept living and dining area
  • Gourmet kitchen with stainless steel appliances
  • Private balcony overlooking the lake
  • In-unit washer and dryer
  • Building amenities include pool, gym, and concierge

image.alt: Modern condo interior with lake view
image.title: Lakefront Condo

values.title: Stately Colonial Estate
values.body:
A magnificent Colonial estate set on two acres of manicured grounds. This five-bedroom home offers gracious living spaces, a gourmet kitchen, and resort-style outdoor amenities.

Key Features

  • Grand foyer with sweeping staircase
  • Chef's kitchen with island and butler's pantry
  • Primary suite with sitting room and spa bath
  • Heated in-ground pool with pool house
  • Three-car attached garage
  • Home theater and wine cellar

image.alt: Stately colonial home with landscaped yard
image.title: Colonial Estate

values.title: Industrial-Chic Downtown Loft
values.body:
Live in the heart of the arts district in this converted warehouse loft featuring soaring 14-foot ceilings, exposed brick walls, and oversized factory windows.

Key Features

  • Open floor plan with 14-foot ceilings
  • Original exposed brick and timber beams
  • Updated kitchen with concrete countertops
  • Walk-in closet and en-suite bathroom
  • One dedicated parking space
  • Pet-friendly building

values.title: Rachel Morgan
values.body: Rachel is the founder and lead broker of Crestview Realty. With over 15 years of experience and $250M in career sales, she specializes in luxury residential properties and has consistently been recognized as a top producer in the region.

values.title: Tom Delgado
values.body: Tom specializes in first-time homebuyers and investment properties. His patient, educational approach has helped hundreds of families navigate the home buying process with confidence. He is bilingual in English and Spanish.

values.title: Priya Sharma
values.body: Priya brings a background in urban planning to her real estate practice, giving her clients unique insights into neighborhood development trends and investment potential. She focuses on condominiums and urban properties.

values.title: Downtown
values.body:
The vibrant heart of the city, Downtown offers an urban lifestyle with walkable streets, diverse dining options, and a thriving arts and entertainment scene.

Living Here

  • Condos and lofts ranging from studios to three-bedrooms
  • Steps from restaurants, cafes, and nightlife
  • Excellent public transit connections
  • Farmers market every Saturday

Best For

Young professionals, couples, and anyone who values walkability and cultural access over yard space.

image.alt: Downtown city streets with shops and restaurants
image.title: Downtown Neighborhood

values.title: Oak Park
values.body:
A charming, tree-lined neighborhood known for its historic homes, excellent schools, and strong sense of community. Oak Park is consistently ranked among the best places to raise a family.

Living Here

  • Craftsman bungalows, Victorians, and newer construction
  • Top-rated elementary and middle schools
  • Community parks with playgrounds and sports fields
  • Annual block parties and neighborhood events

Best For

Families, professionals seeking a quieter lifestyle with easy access to the city, and architecture enthusiasts.

image.alt: Tree-lined residential street in Oak Park
image.title: Oak Park Neighborhood

values.title: Lakeside
values.body:
An upscale waterfront community offering luxury living with stunning lake views. Lakeside features high-rise condos, boutique shopping, and some of the best dining in the region.

Living Here

  • Luxury condominiums and townhomes
  • Lakefront walking and biking trails
  • Marina with boat slips
  • Upscale shopping and fine dining

Best For

Professionals and retirees who value premium amenities, lake access, and a resort-like atmosphere.

values.title: Spring 2026 Housing Market Outlook
values.body:
As we head into the spring selling season, the local housing market is showing signs of balanced conditions after several years of intense competition.

What Buyers Should Know

  • Inventory levels are up 15% compared to last spring
  • Mortgage rates have stabilized in the mid-6% range
  • Multiple offer situations are less common but still happen in desirable neighborhoods

What Sellers Should Know

  • Pricing correctly from day one is more important than ever
  • Homes that are well-staged and professionally photographed sell 20% faster
  • The first two weeks on the market are critical for generating interest

image.alt: Spring housing market with homes for sale
image.title: Spring Market Outlook

values.title: The Complete First-Time Homebuyer Guide
values.body:
Buying your first home is one of the most exciting and overwhelming experiences of your life. This guide breaks the process down into manageable steps.

Before You Start Looking

  • Check your credit score and address any issues
  • Get pre-approved for a mortgage
  • Determine your budget (including closing costs and moving expenses)
  • Make a wish list vs. a must-have list

The Buying Process

  • Work with an experienced buyer's agent
  • Tour properties and take notes
  • Make an offer and negotiate
  • Complete inspections and appraisal
  • Close and get your keys

Our agents specialize in guiding first-time buyers through every step. Reach out for a free consultation.

image.alt: Couple receiving keys to their new home
image.title: First-Time Homebuyer Guide

values.title: 10 Home Staging Tips That Actually Work
values.body:
Staged homes sell faster and for more money. Here are proven staging strategies that deliver real results.

High-Impact Tips

  • Declutter ruthlessly - Remove 50% of your belongings from visible surfaces
  • Deep clean everything - Especially kitchens, bathrooms, and windows
  • Neutralize paint colors - Light gray and warm white appeal to the widest audience
  • Upgrade lighting - Replace dated fixtures and add lamps for warmth
  • Boost curb appeal - Fresh mulch, trimmed hedges, and a painted front door

The Numbers

According to the National Association of Realtors, staged homes sell for an average of 6% more than non-staged homes and spend 73% less time on the market.

values.title: About Crestview Realty
values.body:
Crestview Realty has been helping families buy and sell homes since 2011. As a locally owned and operated brokerage, we combine deep neighborhood expertise with modern marketing strategies to deliver exceptional results for our clients.

Our Approach

We believe in a relationship-first approach to real estate. Our agents take the time to understand your goals, timeline, and budget before showing you a single property. This personalized service has earned us a 98% client satisfaction rating.

Our Promise

  • Expert Guidance - Licensed, experienced agents who know the local market
  • Transparent Communication - Regular updates and honest advice throughout the process
  • Full-Service Support - From financing to closing, we coordinate every detail
